title: Imprisoned Bird
prompt: Translate the following lyrics into English and explain the emotions expressed.
hint: Focus on the feelings of confinement and loneliness in the lyrics.
sample: I am a bird imprisoned by you, already forgetting how high the sky is.
ja: {'prompt': '將以下歌詞翻譯成英文並解釋表達的情感。', 'hint': '著重於歌詞中被囚禁和孤獨的感覺。', 'sample': '我是被你囚禁的鳥，已經忘了天有多高。'}

title: Lonely Word
prompt: Describe the meaning of 'I am like a word that you can have or not have' in the lyrics.
hint: Consider the feeling of being insignificant or replaceable.
sample: I am like a word you can have or not have, exchanging sadness with loneliness.
ja: {'prompt': '描述歌詞中「我像是一個你可有可無的一字」的含義。', 'hint': '考慮被視為無足輕重或可替代的感覺。', 'sample': '我像是一個你可有可無的一字，和寂寞交換著悲傷的心事。'}

title: Tears as Luxury
prompt: Explain the significance of the line 'Tears are the only luxury' in the context of the song.
hint: Think about the emotional cost and rarity of expressing sorrow.
sample: In these meaningless days, tears become the only luxury one can afford.
